title: Remote LP-Solver Service (KBUtilLib)
summary: Async LP-solver service on H100 (Gurobi/CPLEX) + KBUtilLib client over an SSH tunnel; submit gzipped LP, poll for a fixed result schema. HTTP-over-tunnel chosen over SQS.

key_decisions.transport: HTTP over SSH tunnel (not SQS); v1 callers = interactive primary-laptop only
key_decisions.repo: client + FastAPI service both in KBUtilLib
key_decisions.input: raw CPLEX-LP-format text from caller; service cobra-agnostic; trust-solver name fidelity
key_decisions.solver_selection: default Gurobi; explicit honored; no cross-solver fallback; infra failure -> error
key_decisions.timeouts: default 3600s, ceiling 7200s, watchdog +60s, incumbent returned on timeout
key_decisions.persistence: SQLite job store, LP on disk, 48h result TTL, orphan-on-restart -> error
key_decisions.status_mapping: explicit whitelist; unknown -> error with raw code; INF_OR_UNBD re-solve DualReductions=0
key_decisions.wire: gzipped LP on POST /solve; client polls every 2s; client wait outlasts server watchdog
key_decisions.auth_binding: 127.0.0.1:8091, optional bearer token, tunnel = licensing-compliance boundary
key_decisions.deployment: user-level systemd unit on H100 (verified), dedicated venv ~/venvs/lp-solver, linger already on
